title: gonolobus nemorosus
intro: Gonolobus nemorosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the woodland gonolobus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gonolobus nemorosus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Gonolobus nemorosus is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in traditional medicine as a tincture or powder.
